text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The more I race and train, the more often I notice
that something feels... off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Some days my steps are shallower than I intend,
or I run out of stamina as if I started my final
sprint a little too early...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's a very subtle difference, but despite how
insignificant it seems...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creeeak...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It feels like this body I've always relied on is
starting to wear away.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Mornin'! I'm gonna take full advantage of summer
camp and get super duper strong!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Haha, shut up already. You're not the only one
who's gonna improve here.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Look how much energy they've got.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile if I run any more than this, I'm sure I'll
fall apart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp season has arrived again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are lined up in front of the gates,
waiting for the buses to take them to summer
camp. Sakura Chiyono O is among them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her expression is oddly tense, and she
seems nervous...
choice_data_list: Let's do our best at summer camp, Chiyono O!
Let's do our best at summer camp, Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer?! O-of course! Summer camp is a
wonderful opportunity to improve!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've already looked up some effective ways to
train!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... This time... I'd like to focus more on
weightlifting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: As for my running... Um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we save that for the second half of
camp? It'll be exciting to see how much my times
have improved!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Is, uh... Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I actually read a number of articles to prepare for
summer camp, and I've come up with some new
routines as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the training menus is geared toward
Umamusume who are already past their peak,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that's not what she wants, it would be cruel of
me to suggest it.
choice_data_list: (I'll bring it up once she's ready...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Leave it to me. I'll put together a program
centered around strength training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Let's have a great summer camp
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Could I have a few words from you
before you head to the campsite?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Please! The world wants to know the details!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry, but there will be no interviews
at this time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow. There are so many reporters here...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They must be here to interview the Top Three.
They sure are popular.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Please! We'd just like to hear what Maruzensky
has to say!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now, now! Don't be like that. Be nice to Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky! Is it true that you won your first
scrimmage in a long time by seven lengths?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What's the reason for your return? Is it because of
the Top Three? Do you see them as potential
rivals?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm... Well...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's a secret! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I race in the fall! Bye now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vr-vr-vrooooom!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Maruzen?! Please come back, Maruzeeen!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Wow... She's as amazing as ever. And here I
thought she was already past her peak...

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's a legend, after all. She's definitely not
like other Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...They were all here for Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...She's trying to keep our promise.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... I have to do my best too.
